title: braconotia juncea
intro: Braconotia juncea, also known as Indian or Ayurvedic celery, is a plant species belonging to the Apiaceae family. Traditionally, Braconotia juncea is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as aiding in digestion, reducing fever, and helping to lower blood pressure. Braconotia juncea can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions.
